Management Fiction

Management Fiction

Fiction at the intersection of AI governance, management, and the human systems behind institutional decision-making. Published in chapters as they are written.

Now Publishing
Actively Publishing

The Architecture of Thinking

On Judgment, Machines, and Reasoning

A leader navigating the intersection of technology, risk, and organizational decision-making discovers that the hardest questions about intelligent systems are not technical — they are institutional, ethical, and deeply human.

8Chapters published
~175Min total reading
2025Series begun

Sovereign Signal

Set in 2031 Brussels, a policy analyst discovers three major AI governance bodies running on the same foundation model.

The Integration Memo

When a Fortune 100 CHRO mandates AI-assisted performance reviews, a mid-level manager must navigate the consequences.
